  "data": {

    "contract": {

      "notes": [
        "Submitted code must define a synchronous `run(ctx)` function.",

        "Use print() for runtime logging captured into stdout/stderr; ctx.log is not part of the experiment contract.",
        "This is a trusted internal execution harness in the same project runtime, not a hostile-code sandbox.",
        "Raw dataset helpers return DatasetLoadResult wrappers; managed feature helpers return pandas.DataFrame objects directly."
      ],
      "facades": {
        "context_aliases": [
          "load_features(symbol, timeframe, columns=None)"
        ],
        "datasets": [
          "get_catalogue()",
          "list_summaries()",

          "preview(dataset_id)",
          "chart_preview(dataset_id)",
          "load(dataset_id)",
          "load_by_symbol_timeframe(symbol, timeframe)",
          "load_frame_by_symbol_timeframe(symbol, timeframe)",
          "open_time_to_utc(values)"
        ],
        "features": [
          "list_summaries()",
          "get_detail(symbol, timeframe, preview_rows=None)",
          "get_active_columns(symbol, timeframe)",
          "available_columns(timeframe=None)",
          "load_dataset(symbol, timeframe)",

          "load_context_frame(symbol, timeframe, columns=None)"
        ],
        "project": [

          "exists(relative_path)",
          "read_text(relative_path)",
          "read_json(relative_path)",
          "read_dataframe(relative_path)"
        ],

        ],
        "backtests": [
          "list_saved_runs()",
          "list_active_runs()",
          "load_run_detail(run_id, include_analysis=False, include_trades=False)",
          "get_events(run_id, limit=None)",
          "get_trades(run_id, limit=None)",
          "get_chart_price(run_id, exact_candles=False)",
          "get_chart_equity(run_id)",
          "list_snapshots()",
          "get_snapshot(snapshot_id, version=None)",
          "get_snapshot_response(snapshot_id, version=None)"
        ],
        "artifacts": [
          "path(relative_path)",
          "write_text(relative_path, content)",
          "write_json(relative_path, payload)",
          "write_dataframe(relative_path, frame)",
          "write_context_artifact(relative_path, frame, symbol=None, anchor_timeframe=None, description=None, derived_fields=[...])",
          "save_plot(figure, relative_path)",
          "list()"
        ]
      },

        {
          "name": "load_features",
          "signature": "load_features(symbol, timeframe, columns=None)",
          "returns": "pandas.DataFrame",
          "summary": "Compatibility alias for the canonical managed-feature analysis frame helper.",
          "notes": [
            "Equivalent to ctx.features.load_analysis_frame(symbol, timeframe, columns=columns).",
            "Use ctx.features.load_analysis_frame(...) in new experiment code."
          ]
        }
      ],
      "logging_contract": {
        "supported_runtime_logging": "Use print() for runtime logs captured into stdout/stderr.",
        "unsupported_runtime_logging": "ctx.log is not part of the experiment contract."
      },
      "artifact_path_contract": {
        "path_scope": "server_runtime",
        "note": "Filesystem paths returned by experiment tools refer to the MCP server runtime host, not a shared client workspace path."

notes: Submitted code must define a synchronous `run(ctx)` function.
Return values must be JSON-serializable after conversion of dataclasses, paths, timestamps, and dataframes.
Use ctx.artifacts for supported file output; use regular MCP domain tools for platform mutations such as feature builds or backtest runs.
Use print() for runtime logging captured into stdout/stderr; ctx.log is not part of the experiment contract.
This is a trusted internal execution harness in the same project runtime, not a hostile-code sandbox.
Raw dataset helpers return DatasetLoadResult wrappers; managed feature helpers return pandas.DataFrame objects directly.

market_data: fetch_binance_open_interest_hist(symbol, period, start_time_ms, end_time_ms, limit=500, max_pages=200)
artifacts: write_context_artifact(relative_path, frame, symbol=None, anchor_timeframe=None, description=None, derived_fields=[...])

Use experiments_inspect(view='list') to review prior experiment jobs.
